case_title: GERALDINE REYES VS. MELVIN HUGO PRITCHARD

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY REYES, GERALDINE PRITCHARD, MELVIN HUGO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2016 BY DANIEL WEINGARTEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF GERALDINE REYES. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MELVIN HUGO PRITCHARD. PARTIES STIPULATE TO HEARING BEFORE JPT. REQUEST TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME ON COURT RECORDS FROM MELVIN HUGO TO MELVIN HUGO PRITCHARD - GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DANIEL WEINGARTEN. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, GERALDINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRITCHARD, MELVIN HUGO (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, GERALDINE AS TO DEFENDANT PRITCHARD, MELVIN HUGO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-03-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRITCHARD, MELVIN HUGO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY REYES, GERALDINE AS TO DEFENDANT PRITCHARD, MELVIN HUGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
